commits.author: copilot-swe-agent[bot]
commits.message: Move SetHighDpiMode to the very start of Main() before any WinForms API usage
commits.reason: DPI must init before any WinForms API

commits.author: copilot-swe-agent[bot]
commits.message: Fix small fonts and cursor mismatch at 125% display scaling by enabling PerMonitorV2 DPI mode
commits.reason: DPI fix — we already have PerMonitorV2 but check for differences

commits.author: copilot-swe-agent[bot]
commits.message: Fix Audio Capture bug: read InheritRedirectAudioCapture instead of RedirectAudioCapture for inheritance flag
commits.reason: Bug fix — audio capture inheritance was reading wrong property
